papers.title_en: Artificial Intelligence-based Algorithm for Predicting Outcomes in Early-stage Lung Cancer (AI PREDICTION): An Annotation-free Imaging AI Study
papers.tldr: 本研究针对临床I期非小细胞肺癌预后评估中传统因素主观性强且多变的问题，开发并验证了一种名为AI PREDICTION的无标注影像AI算法。该算法无需人工标注即可通过影像数据预测患者预后，为早期肺癌手术后的结果预测提供了一个客观、高效的工具，显著提升了预后评估的自动化水平与准确性。
papers.abstract_en: Objective Surgery remains the standard treatment for clinical stage I non–small celllung cancer (NSCLC). Conventional prognostic factors are often subjective andvariable, highlighting the need for objective prediction. We developed and validated …

papers.title_en: Leveraging co-attention-based interactions between pathology and radiology for pan-cancer survival prediction
papers.tldr: 本研究提出一种基于协同注意力机制（co-attention）的多模态融合框架，旨在整合宏观放射学影像与微观病理学图像进行泛癌生存预测。通过捕捉两种模态间的复杂交互作用，该方法提供了肿瘤的多尺度视图，有效克服了单一模态在预后评估中的局限性，为精准肿瘤学研究提供了新的技术手段。
papers.abstract_en: Background Integrating macroscopic radiology with microscopic pathology canprovide a multiscale view of tumors, thereby advancing oncology research. However,utilizing the interplay between the two for survival analysis, particularly across …

papers.title_en: Zero-Shot Lung Disease Detection Using Radiological Symptomatic Descriptors and Pretrained Neural Networks
papers.tldr: 针对胸部X射线影像中放射学特征与临床文本描述对齐困难的挑战，本研究提出DVLM框架。该框架通过双头视觉语言模型结合神经记忆机制，利用放射学症状描述符实现零样本肺部疾病检测，显著提升了模型在未见疾病类别上的识别能力和泛化性能。
papers.abstract_en: Aligning radiological features with clinical text descriptions remains a key challengefor zero-shot disease recognition in chest radiography. We propose DVLM (Dual-Head Vision-Language Model with Neural Memory), a framework combining Vision …

papers.title_en: AXIS-Net: Asymmetric attention and Scale-Integrated fusion network for robust breast lesion segmentation in ultrasound images
papers.tldr: 针对超声图像中噪声大、对比度低及病变边界不规则导致的分割难题，本文提出AXIS-Net。该网络采用编码器-解码器架构，通过引入非对称注意力机制和尺度集成跳跃连接，有效提升了多尺度特征的融合能力与病变区域的定位精度，在乳腺病变分割任务中展现出优异的鲁棒性和准确性。
papers.abstract_en: Accurate breast lesion segmentation in ultrasound is hindered by noise, low contrast,and irregular boundaries. In this paper, we propose AXIS-Net (Asymmetric Attentionand Scale-Integrated Skip connections Network), an encoder–decoder framework …

papers.title_en: Thought Graph Traversal for Test-time Scaling in Chest X-ray VLLMs
papers.tldr: 本文针对胸部X射线（CXR）视觉语言大模型（VLLM）推理能力提升的需求，提出了一种无需额外训练的测试时缩放（Test-time Scaling）方法。该方法通过“思维图遍历”策略，在推理阶段构建并探索多种推理路径，从而优化模型的诊断逻辑。研究证明，通过增加推理时的计算量，可以显著提升模型在医学影像分析中的准确性和可靠性，为医疗大模型的性能优化提供了新思路。
papers.abstract_en: Test-time scaling offers a promising way to improve the reasoning performance ofvision-language large models (VLLMs) without additional training. In this paper, weexplore a simple but effective approach for applying test-time scaling to chest X-ray …

papers.title_en: RIHA: Report-Image Hierarchical Alignment for Radiology Report Generation
papers.tldr: 放射科报告生成（RRG）旨在通过自动生成诊断报告来减轻医生负担，但图像与文本间的语义对齐是核心挑战。本文提出RIHA框架，通过报告与图像的层级对齐机制，在不同粒度上增强视觉特征与医学术语的关联。该方法有效提升了生成报告的准确性与临床一致性，为自动化医疗诊断提供了更精准的跨模态对齐方案。
papers.abstract_en: Radiology report generation (RRG) has emerged as a promising approach toalleviate radiologists' workload and reduce human errors by automaticallygenerating diagnostic reports from medical images. A key challenge in RRG is …

papers.title_en: A Regularized Backbone-Level Cross-Modal Interaction Framework for Stable Temporal Reasoning in Video-Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究针对第一人称视角视频理解中观测稀疏、噪声大及时间歧义等挑战，提出了一个正则化的骨干级跨模态交互框架。该框架从理论层面探讨了视频语言模型的稳定性，通过在骨干网络层引入正则化交互机制，增强了模型在处理复杂第一人称视频时的时序推理能力。实验证明，该方法在提高模型稳定性的同时，显著提升了视频理解任务的性能，为构建鲁棒的视频语言模型提供了新思路。
papers.abstract_en: Deep learning approaches for egocentric video understanding often lack a principledtheoretical treatment of stability, particularly when dealing with the sparse, noisy, andtemporally ambiguous observations characteristic of first-person imaging. In this …

papers.title_en: Preoperative Prediction of Axillary Lymph Node Metastasis in Breast Cancer Using a Three-tier MRI Radiomics Model with Nested Cross-validation
papers.tldr: 本研究旨在提高乳腺癌术前腋窝淋巴结（ALN）转移预测的准确性。研究开发并验证了一个整合临床特征、定性MRI表现及影像组学特征的三层预测模型，并采用嵌套交叉验证法进行评估。该模型通过多源数据融合，为临床医生提供了一种非侵入性的精准评估工具，有助于优化乳腺癌患者的个体化治疗方案。
papers.abstract_en: Rationale and Objectives To develop and validate a three-tier model incorporatingclinical, qualitative magnetic resonance imaging (MRI), and radiomics features forpreoperative prediction of axillary lymph node (ALN) metastasis in breast cancer …

papers.title_en: Stable or not? unraveling the reliability of radiomic features in 4d-computed tomography in early-stage non-small cell lung cancer
papers.tldr: 本研究探讨了早期非小细胞肺癌（NSCLC）中四维计算机断层扫描（4D-CT）影像组学特征的可靠性。尽管4D-CT是放疗规划的金标准，但其在影像组学中的应用仍待挖掘。研究提出了一种可复现且可扩展的框架，旨在评估不同呼吸时相下影像组学特征的稳定性，为筛选稳健的生物标志物提供了重要参考，从而提升临床决策的准确性。
papers.abstract_en: Aim Four-dimensional computed tomography (4D-CT) is the gold standard forradiotherapy planning in non-small cell lung cancer (NSCLC), yet its use inradiomics remains underexplored. This study proposes a reproducible, scalable …

papers.title_en: A Skip-Free Collaborative Residual U-Net for Secure Multi-Center Liver and Tumor Segmentation
papers.tldr: 本研究针对腹部CT影像中肝脏与肿瘤分割面临的隐私保护和跨机构数据异构性挑战，提出了一种无跳跃连接的协作残差U-Net模型。该方法通过协作学习框架实现了多中心数据的安全利用，在严格遵守隐私法规的前提下，利用改进的残差结构提升了分割精度，为临床诊断和治疗规划提供了一种高效且安全的深度学习解决方案。
papers.abstract_en: Accurate liver and tumor segmentation from abdominal computed tomography (CT)scans is essential for diagnosis and treatment planning; however, centralized deeplearning approaches are often constrained by privacy regulations and inter-institution …

papers.title_en: Hierarchical context modeling and prototype-mediated cross-modal alignment for histopathology report generation
papers.tldr: 本研究针对病理全扫描图像（WSI）生成临床报告耗时耗力的问题，提出了一种层次化上下文建模与原型介导的跨模态对齐框架。该方法通过分层处理WSI的复杂空间信息，并利用原型机制增强视觉特征与文本描述之间的对齐，旨在自动化生成准确的病理报告，从而显著提升临床诊断效率并减轻病理医生的工作负担。
papers.abstract_en: Histopathology in whole slide images (WSIs) serves as the gold standard for cancerdiagnosis, with clinical reports playing a critical role in decision-making. However,the time-consuming nature of conventional pathological examination has driven …

papers.title_en: Vision-language Models for Structured Report Generation in Radiology: Towards Consistent and Reliable Chest X-ray Reporting
papers.tldr: 本研究针对放射科医生工作负担重及报告一致性差的问题，探索了利用大型预训练视觉语言模型（VLMs）自动生成结构化胸部X光报告的方法。通过优化模型以提高报告的可靠性与一致性，该方法旨在为临床提供更精准的辅助诊断工具。研究展示了VLMs在医疗报告自动化领域的应用前景，为实现高效、标准化的放射学诊断提供了技术支撑。
papers.abstract_en: Medical report generation (MRG) aims to automatically generate reports frommedical images, reducing the workload on radiologists. Research in this field isprogressing rapidly with large pretrained vision-language models (VLMs), but most …

papers.title_en: Efficient Deep Ladle-Net for fast universal 3D lesion segmentation on chest–abdomen–pelvis computed tomography
papers.tldr: 本研究针对胸部-腹部-盆腔CT影像中通用病灶分割的复杂性，提出了一种高效的Deep Ladle-Net模型。该模型旨在实现快速且准确的三维病灶分割，以辅助医生在随访CT中评估肿瘤大小及治疗效果。通过优化网络结构，该方法在保证分割精度的同时显著提升了计算效率，为临床肿瘤监测提供了有力的技术支持。
papers.abstract_en: Accurate evaluation of tumor size on follow-up computed tomography (CT) scans iscritical for assessing treatment efficacy in cancer patients. However, universal lesionsegmentation of CT remains a significant challenge due to the complexity and …

papers.title_en: Foundation models in medical image segmentation
papers.tldr: 本文综述了基础模型在医学图像分割领域的研究进展。针对传统深度学习模型受限于特定任务且泛化性不足的问题，文章重点探讨了通用分割基础模型（如SAM）在医疗场景下的应用潜力。通过对比分析基础模型与专用模型在不同医学影像任务中的表现，揭示了其在零样本学习和跨模态应用中的优势与局限，为构建高性能医学通用模型提供了指导。
papers.abstract_en: Task-constrained deep learning models have shown strong perfor-mance formedical image segmentation. Recently, generalist segmentation foundation modelshave emerged, showing promising results across different scenarios. However, we …

papers.title_en: Foundation Models in Medical Image Segmentation: How Foundational Are Foundation Models Really?
papers.tldr: 本研究深入探讨了通用分割基础模型在医疗影像领域的实际效能，旨在评估其是否真正具备替代特定任务模型的“基础性”。通过对比通用基础模型与针对特定医疗任务优化的深度学习模型，论文揭示了两者在不同临床场景下的性能差异。研究指出，尽管基础模型展现出跨场景的潜力，但在医疗影像的精准分割任务中仍面临挑战，为未来医疗专用大模型的发展提供了重要见解。
papers.abstract_en: Task-constrained deep learning models have shown strong performance for medicalimage segmentation. Recently, generalist segmentation foundation models haveemerged, showing promising results across different scenarios. However, we lack …

papers.title_en: Advancing Radiograph Representation Learning via Cascading Graph Alignment for Vision-Language Clinical Concepts
papers.tldr: 本研究针对放射影像与报告预训练中临床概念对齐不充分的问题，提出了级联图对齐（Cascading Graph Alignment）框架。该方法通过构建图结构显式地对齐视觉特征与临床概念，克服了传统隐式对齐的局限性。实验证明，该方法显著提升了放射影像的表示学习能力，在多项下游医学影像任务中取得了优异表现，为临床视觉语言预训练提供了新思路。
papers.abstract_en: Vision-language pre-training on paired radiology images and reports has showngreat potential to promote downstream image tasks. However, its potential is far fromfully unleashed when conducting implicit alignment for clinically significant concepts …

papers.title_en: Pseudo-Likelihood Training for Reasoning Diffusion Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究针对扩散语言模型（Diffusion LLMs）在推理和对齐任务中难以应用传统策略梯度强化学习（PGRL）的问题，提出了一种基于伪似然（Pseudo-Likelihood）的训练方法。该方法弥补了扩散模型与现有强化学习框架之间的兼容性鸿沟，为提升扩散模型的逻辑推理能力提供了新路径，实验证明其在复杂推理任务上具有显著效果。
papers.abstract_en: Policy-gradient reinforcement learning (PGRL) forms the backbone of currentmethods used to enhance alignment and reasoning in Large Language Models(LLMs). However, these methods are incompatible with diffusion based language …

papers.title_en: Semantic-Aware Data Imputation in Dynamic Relational Databases via Pre-trained Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究针对动态关系型数据库中缺失值影响系统效能的问题，提出了一种利用预训练语言模型（PLM）进行语义感知数据填补的新方法。该方法通过挖掘数据间的深层语义关联，解决了传统填补技术在处理动态变化和复杂关系数据时的局限性，为提升数据库数据质量提供了高效的自动化解决方案。
papers.abstract_en: Digital systems for information and representation management rely on databasearchitectures, whose effectiveness is undermined by the presence of missing values.Data Imputation (DI) is a well-known process that replaces missing values, usually …

papers.title_en: Energy Matching based Preference Learning for Diffusion Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究针对扩散语言模型（Diffusion LMs）难以应用策略梯度强化学习的问题，提出了一种基于能量匹配（Energy Matching）的偏好学习框架。由于扩散模型在似然估计上存在挑战，传统RL方法难以直接迁移，该方法通过能量函数建模绕过了似然计算难题，为提升扩散语言模型的推理能力和对齐效果提供了新途径。
papers.abstract_en: Policy-gradient reinforcement learning (RL) is widely used to improve languagemodel reasoning, but existing methods are not compatible with diffusion languagemodels. The primary reason for this is the difficulty of likelihood estimation with such …

papers.title_en: CMedBench: A Comprehensive Benchmark for Efficient Medical Large Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究针对医疗大语言模型（LLM）在部署时面临的高计算和内存需求挑战，提出了CMedBench，这是一个专门用于评估高效医疗LLM的综合基准。该基准重点关注量化和稀疏化等模型压缩技术在医疗场景下的表现，旨在为开发兼顾性能与效率的医疗AI模型提供标准化的评估框架和实践指导。
papers.abstract_en: Large Language Models (LLMs) hold significant potential for enhancing healthcareapplications, yet their deployment is hindered by high computational and memorydemands. Model compression techniques, such as quantization and sparsification …

papers.title_en: VCGD: Visual Clue Guided Decoding with Caption Model for Mitigating Hallucination in Multimodal Large Language Models
papers.tldr: 针对多模态大语言模型（MLLM）中普遍存在的幻觉问题，本文提出了VCGD（视觉线索引导解码）方法。该方法通过引入图像描述模型生成的视觉线索来干预解码过程，确保生成内容与图像事实一致。研究证明，VCGD能显著降低模型生成错误或虚假信息的概率，在不重新训练模型的情况下，有效提升了MLLM在多模态理解任务中的可靠性与忠实度。
papers.abstract_en: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) demonstrate strong capabilities inmultimodal understanding, reasoning, and interaction but still face the fundamentallimitation of hallucinations, where they generate erroneous or fabricated information …

papers.title_en: Adaptive-PVT: Unlocking the Power of Adaptive Mechanisms for Medical Image Segmentation
papers.tldr: 针对医学图像分割中细节丢失、病灶边界模糊及特征融合不足等挑战，本文提出了一种名为Adaptive-PVT的新型架构。该方法通过引入自适应机制增强了金字塔视觉Transformer（PVT）的特征提取能力，旨在更有效地捕捉精细细节并优化病灶边界的识别。研究的主要贡献在于提出了一种能够自适应调整特征融合过程的框架，显著提升了复杂医学场景下的分割精度，为计算机辅助诊断提供了更可靠的技术支持。
papers.abstract_en: Medical image segmentation is a pivotal task in computer-aided diagnosis yetremains a significant challenge due to the loss of fine details, blurred lesionboundaries, and insufficient feature fusion. To address these limitations, we propose …

papers.title_en: Application of adaptive deep learning-based automatic segmentation in radiomics model for preoperative WHO/ISUP grading of clear cell renal cell carcinoma: a …
papers.tldr: 本研究旨在评估不同肿瘤区域分割方法在构建透明细胞肾细胞癌（ccRCC）WHO/ISUP分级预测模型中的表现。通过引入基于自适应深度学习的自动分割技术，研究对比了其与传统方法在放射组学建模中的差异。结果表明，该自动化方法能有效提高术前分级预测的效率与准确性，为临床决策提供可靠的影像学支持。
papers.abstract_en: Aim To evaluate the effectiveness of different methods for segmenting tumor regionsof interest in building prediction models for the World Health Organization/International Society of Urological Pathology (WHO/ISUP) grade of clear cell renal …

papers.title_en: VIVID-Med: LLM-Supervised Structured Pretraining for Deployable Medical ViTs
papers.tldr: 针对医疗图像预训练中标签过于简单或文本过于杂乱的问题，本文提出VIVID-Med框架。该方法利用大语言模型（LLM）生成结构化的监督信号，对医疗视觉Transformer（ViT）进行预训练。通过结合LLM的知识提取能力与结构化数据优势，VIVID-Med显著提升了可部署医疗视觉模型的特征表示能力，在多项医学影像任务中表现优异。
papers.abstract_en: Vision-language pretraining has driven significant progress in medical imageanalysis. However, current methods typically supervise visual encoders using one-hot labels or free-form text, neither of which effectively captures the complex …

papers.title_en: Examining Reasoning LLMs-as-Judges in Non-Verifiable LLM Post-Training
papers.tldr: 本研究探讨了在无法直接验证输出正确性的非验证性领域中，利用具备推理能力的LLM作为评判者（Reasoning LLMs-as-Judges）的效果。通过利用推理模型在推理阶段的可扩展性，研究分析了其在LLM后训练阶段提升模型质量的潜力。本文评估了这种方法在缺乏标准答案的任务中的表现，为扩展推理模型应用范围提供了重要见解。
papers.abstract_en: Reasoning LLMs-as-Judges, which can benefit from inference-time scaling, providea promising path for extending the success of reasoning models to non-verifiabledomains where the output correctness/quality cannot be directly checked. However …

papers.title_en: Test-time RL alignment exposes task familiarity artifacts in LLM benchmarks
papers.tldr: 本研究探讨了LLM基准测试中的“任务熟悉度”偏差，指出高分可能源于模型对特定任务的预先接触而非真实能力。作者提出了一种“先练后测”的评估框架，利用测试时强化学习（RL）对齐来控制熟悉度变量。研究发现，这种方法能有效暴露基准测试中的伪影，为更准确地衡量模型通用能力提供了新视角，强调了在评估中区分记忆与推理的重要性。
papers.abstract_en: Direct evaluation of LLMs on benchmarks can be misleading because comparativelystrong performance may reflect task familiarity rather than capability. The train-before-test approach controls for task familiarity by giving each model task-relevant training …

papers.title_en: Projection Guided Personalized Federated Learning for Low Dose CT Denoising
papers.tldr: 本研究针对低剂量CT（LDCT）在不同机构间存在的噪声分布差异及隐私保护需求，提出了一种投影引导的个性化联邦学习框架。该方法通过引入投影域信息来优化各参与方的本地模型，有效解决了传统联邦学习在处理异构医学影像数据时的性能瓶颈。实验证明，该框架在提升去噪效果的同时，实现了跨机构的协同优化，为临床LDCT影像质量提升提供了高效且隐私安全的解决方案。
papers.abstract_en: Low-dose CT (LDCT) reduces radiation exposure but introduces protocol-dependentnoise and artifacts that vary across institutions. While federated learning enablescollaborative training without centralizing patient data, existing methods personalize …

papers.title_en: CAMD: Coverage-Aware Multimodal Decoding for Efficient Reasoning of Multimodal Large Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究针对多模态大语言模型（MLLM）在推理过程中存在的计算量与任务难度不匹配问题，提出了覆盖感知多模态解码（CAMD）方法。通过实证分析，作者发现模型在处理不同难度的视觉语言任务时效率低下。CAMD通过感知输入覆盖范围动态调整解码过程，旨在实现更高效的推理。该方法在保持或提升推理能力的同时，显著降低了计算开销，为多模态模型的高效部署提供了新思路。
papers.abstract_en: Recent advances in Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have shownimpressive reasoning capabilities across vision-language tasks, yet still face thechallenge of compute-difficulty mismatch. Through empirical analyses, we identify …

papers.title_en: Cognitive Mismatch in Multimodal Large Language Models for Discrete Symbol Understanding
papers.tldr: 本研究探讨了多模态大模型（MLLMs）在处理离散符号（如文字、数学符号等）时的能力瓶颈。尽管MLLMs在自然场景识别中表现优异，但在面对构成人类认知基础的抽象符号时存在显著的“认知失配”。通过对比实验，作者揭示了模型在符号逻辑推理与视觉感知之间的鸿沟，为提升MLLMs的认知深度和通用性提供了重要参考。
papers.abstract_en: While Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have achieved remarkablesuccess in interpreting natural scenes, their ability to process discrete symbols--thefundamental building blocks of human cognition--remains a critical open question …

papers.title_en: Automatic Configuration of LLM Post-Training Pipelines
papers.tldr: 本研究针对大语言模型（LLM）后训练过程中监督微调（SFT）与强化学习（RL）阶段配置困难的问题，提出了一种自动化配置框架。由于后训练流水线具有高维异构且阶段强耦合的特点，在现实计算预算下手动调优极具挑战。该方法通过系统化搜索优化配置，显著提升了模型性能，为高效构建高质量LLM提供了自动化解决方案。
papers.abstract_en: LLM post-training pipelines that combine supervised fine-tuning and reinforcementlearning are difficult to configure under realistic compute budgets: the configurationspace is high-dimensional and heterogeneous, stages are strongly coupled, and …

papers.title_en: ForestPrune: High-ratio Visual Token Compression for Video Multimodal Large Language Models via Spatial-Temporal Forest Modeling
papers.tldr: 针对视频多模态大语言模型（MLLM）面临的巨大计算和内存开销挑战，本文提出了ForestPrune。虽然图像领域的Token压缩已取得进展，但视频任务仍缺乏高效的高倍率压缩方案。ForestPrune通过时空森林建模实现高比例的视觉Token压缩，在显著降低资源消耗的同时，保持了模型在视频理解任务上的优异性能，为长视频处理提供了新思路。
papers.abstract_en: Due to the great saving of computation and memory overhead, token compressionhas become a research hot-spot for MLLMs and achieved remarkable progress inimage-language tasks. However, for the video, existing methods still fall short of high …

papers.title_en: VISion On Request: Enhanced VLLM efficiency with sparse, dynamically selected, vision-language interactions
papers.tldr: 针对大型视觉语言模型（LVLM）因视觉标记缩减导致的性能瓶颈，本文提出 VISOR 方法。该方法摒弃了传统的静态标记缩减，转而采用稀疏且动态选择的视觉-语言交互机制。通过按需调用视觉特征，VISOR 在显著提升模型推理效率的同时，有效避免了信息丢失，在多个视觉问答任务中实现了性能与速度的平衡。
papers.abstract_en: Existing approaches for improving the efficiency of Large Vision-Language Models(LVLMs) are largely based on the concept of visual token reduction. This approach,however, creates an information bottleneck that impairs performance, especially on …

papers.title_en: Perturbation: A simple and efficient adversarial tracer for representation learning in language models
papers.tldr: 本研究针对语言模型中语言表示学习难以定位和解释的问题，提出了一种名为 Perturbation 的简单且高效的对抗性追踪器。该方法通过对抗性技术来探测和分析模型内部的表示，旨在解决现有研究在寻找表示时面临的困境。该工具为理解深度语言模型的内部机制提供了一种高效的新途径，在理论研究和实际应用中均具有重要意义。
papers.abstract_en: Linguistic representation learning in deep neural language models (LMs) has beenstudied for decades, for both practical and theoretical reasons. However, findingrepresentations in LMs remains an unsolved problem, in part due to a dilemma …

papers.title_en: Seeing Like Radiologists: Context-and Gaze-Guided Vision-Language Pretraining for Chest X-rays
papers.tldr: 本研究针对现有医学视觉语言预训练模型忽视放射科医生诊断流程的问题，提出了一种结合临床上下文和眼动追踪信息的预training框架。通过模拟医生在阅片时的视觉推理过程，该方法将放射影像从孤立图像转变为具有上下文关联的诊断线索，显著提升了模型对胸部X光片的理解能力和诊断准确性，为构建更符合临床逻辑的AI模型提供了新思路。
papers.abstract_en: Despite recent advances in medical vision-language pretraining, existing models stillstruggle to capture the diagnostic workflow: radiographs are typically treated ascontext-agnostic images, while radiologists' gaze--a crucial cue for visual reasoning …

papers.title_en: MUST: Modality-Specific Representation-Aware Transformer for Diffusion-Enhanced Survival Prediction with Missing Modality
papers.tldr: 本研究针对临床中多模态医学数据缺失导致的生存预测难题，提出了MUST框架。该框架结合了模态特定表示感知的Transformer与扩散模型，旨在增强缺失模态下的特征表示。通过利用扩散模型对不完整模态进行表征增强，MUST在处理数据缺失时表现出更强的鲁棒性和预测准确性，为精准肿瘤学提供了有效的技术支持。
papers.abstract_en: Accurate survival prediction from multimodal medical data is essential for precisiononcology, yet clinical deployment faces a persistent challenge: modalities arefrequently incomplete due to cost constraints, technical limitations, or retrospective …

papers.title_en: Towards GUI Agents: Vision-Language Diffusion Models for GUI Grounding
papers.tldr: 本研究探讨了在图形用户界面（GUI）定位任务中，利用离散扩散视觉语言模型（DVLM）替代传统的自回归（AR）模型。针对GUI Agent在理解和定位界面元素时的挑战，作者提出了一种基于扩散模型的新框架。该方法通过离散扩散过程提升了模型对界面布局的感知能力，在多个GUI定位基准测试中展现出优于或等同于主流AR模型的性能，为开发高效GUI智能体提供了新思路。
papers.abstract_en: Autoregressive (AR) vision-language models (VLMs) have long dominatedmultimodal understanding, reasoning, and graphical user interface (GUI) grounding.Recently, discrete diffusion vision-language models (DVLMs) have shown strong …

papers.title_en: Mitigating the Reasoning Tax in Vision-Language Fine-Tuning with Input-Adaptive Depth Aggregation
papers.tldr: 本研究针对视觉语言模型（VLM）在指令微调过程中出现的“推理税”问题，即感知能力提升伴随推理能力下降的现象，提出了一种输入自适应深度聚合方法。该方法通过动态调整模型深度来平衡不同任务需求，旨在微调阶段保留模型的逻辑推理能力，同时增强其视觉感知水平，为优化多模态模型性能提供了新思路。
papers.abstract_en: Supervised fine-tuning (SFT) on visual instruction data often improves perceptualcapabilities in vision-language models (VLMs) while degrading reasoningperformance, creating a persistent reasoning tax during post-training. We investigate …

papers.title_en: Learning to Predict Future-Aligned Research Proposals with Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究针对大语言模型在辅助科研构思时难以评估生成提案质量的问题，提出了一种预测“未来对齐”科研提案的新框架。该方法通过训练模型识别并生成符合未来研究趋势的创意，解决了传统人工评估在创新性和合理性衡量上的局限性。研究证明，该方法能有效提升科研提案的前瞻性，为自动化科研评估提供了高效且可扩展的解决方案。
papers.abstract_en: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used to assist ideation in research,but evaluating the quality of LLM-generated research proposals remains difficult:novelty and soundness are hard to measure automatically, and large-scale human …

papers.title_en: MEDIC-AD: Towards Medical Vision-Language Model's Clinical Intelligence
papers.tldr: 本研究针对现有医疗视觉语言模型（VLM）在病灶检测、症状追踪及视觉可解释性等临床实际应用中存在的不足，提出了 MEDIC-AD 框架。该框架旨在将 VLM 的广泛知识转化为可操作的临床智能，通过增强模型对医学图像的深度分析与解释能力，提升了诊断的准确性与透明度，为医疗 AI 在真实临床场景的落地提供了重要技术支撑。
papers.abstract_en: Lesion detection, symptom tracking, and visual explainability are central to real-worldmedical image analysis, yet current medical Vision-Language Models (VLMs) stilllack mechanisms that translate their broad knowledge into clinically actionable …

papers.title_en: Project Imaging-X: A Survey of 1000+ Open-Access Medical Imaging Datasets for Foundation Model Development
papers.tldr: 本研究推出了Project Imaging-X，这是一项针对1000多个开放获取医学影像数据集的全面综述。针对医学影像领域缺乏大规模、多样化数据集以支持基础模型开发的问题，研究团队系统地整理了这些资源。该项目旨在通过提供高质量的数据集集合，降低医学基础模型的研发门槛，推动医疗人工智能在多任务和多领域中的应用与发展。
papers.abstract_en: Foundation models have demonstrated remarkable success across diverse domainsand tasks, primarily due to the thrive of large-scale, diverse, and high-qualitydatasets. However, in the field of medical imaging, the curation and assembling of …

papers.title_en: Calibrated Confidence Expression for Radiology Report Generation
papers.tldr: 本研究针对放射科报告生成中大视觉语言模型（LVLM）的安全性，提出了一种校准置信度表达的方法。旨在不仅提供准确的诊断报告，还能给出临床可解释的指标，以指示何时需要人工审核。通过优化模型的置信度校准，该方法实现了选择性预测，显著提升了模型在临床部署中的可靠性与安全性。
papers.abstract_en: Safe deployment of Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) in radiology reportgeneration requires not only accurate predictions but also clinically interpretableindicators of when outputs should be thoroughly reviewed, enabling selective …
